attention_scale_broadcast_bug.source_description: Attention scaling broadcast bug — learned scale creates wrong broadcasting with attention matrix

autoencoder_bottleneck_bug.source_description: Autoencoder bottleneck mismatch — common in VAE tutorials when latent_dim is edited

autoencoder_correct.source_description: Symmetric autoencoder with matching bottleneck — correct

batchnorm_eval_mismatch.source_description: BatchNorm2d channel mismatch after conv — manifests in both train and eval but often caught late in eval

bert_encoder_correct.source_description: BERT encoder with correct embeddings and pooler — correct

bert_pooler_dim_bug.source_description: BERT pooler dense layer input dimension bug — GitHub PR pattern where hidden_size was changed but pooler not updated

cifar_pool_flatten_bug.source_description: CIFAR tutorial model — forgot a pooling layer but computed FC dim assuming two pools

classification_head_after_attention_bug.source_description: Using AdaptiveAvgPool2d on 3D tensor — common confusion between sequence and image pooling

conv_batchnorm_mismatch.source_description: Conv-BatchNorm channel mismatch — high-frequency bug in PyTorch GitHub Issues

convnext_block_bug.source_description: ConvNeXt block residual dimension mismatch — pwconv2 output != input channels

dcgan_generator_conv_bug.source_description: DCGAN generator channel mismatch — pattern from PyTorch DCGAN tutorial Issues

dcgan_reshape_bug.source_description: DCGAN generator reshape bug — StackOverflow pattern: wrong view dimensions after projection

detr_correct.source_description: DETR-style detector with correct query and feature dimensions

detr_query_dim_bug.source_description: DETR object query dimension mismatch — query embedding dim != transformer hidden dim

dropout_eval_shape_bug.source_description: Dropout does not change shape but developer confused about output dim — StackOverflow pattern

dual_encoder_concat_bug.source_description: Multi-modal fusion concatenation dimension error — text+image feature concat wrong total

efficientnet_se_bug.source_description: Squeeze-and-Excitation block channel mismatch — se_fc2 outputs wrong channel count

embedding_layernorm_bug.source_description: Positional embedding dimension mismatch with token embedding — GPT/BERT config error pattern

feature_pyramid_broadcast_bug.source_description: Feature Pyramid Network lateral fusion without upsampling — missing F.interpolate

flatten_wrong_start_dim.source_description: Flatten start_dim=0 bug — flattens batch dimension, common beginner mistake on StackOverflow

gan_discriminator_correct.source_description: GAN discriminator with correct flatten dimension for 32x32 input

gan_discriminator_fc_bug.source_description: GAN discriminator flatten dimension calculation error — common when changing image size

gpt_ffn_inner_dim_bug.source_description: GPT feed-forward network inner dimension mismatch — second Linear input != first Linear output

gpt_lm_head_dim_bug.source_description: GPT language model head dimension mismatch — pattern from nanoGPT Issues where d_model was changed

layernorm_dim_bug.source_description: LayerNorm normalized_shape mismatch — from HuggingFace Transformers Issues

mlp_correct.source_description: Standard MNIST MLP with dropout — correct baseline

mlp_hidden_chain_bug.source_description: Classic MLP layer chain mismatch — most common StackOverflow beginner error

mobilenet_depthwise_bug.source_description: MobileNet-style depthwise separable conv channel mismatch — common when editing channel multiplier

multihead_attention_embed_dim_bug.source_description: MultiheadAttention embed_dim mismatch — common when changing hidden size in transformer configs

residual_broadcast_dim_bug.source_description: ResNet residual spatial dimension mismatch — stride-2 conv without matching downsample on skip

resnet_downsample_correct.source_description: ResNet block with correct 1x1 projection downsample

resnet_fc_after_pool_bug.source_description: ResNet-style flatten-to-FC dimension mismatch — common in GitHub Issues when changing backbone width

resnet_skip_channel_bug.source_description: ResNet skip connection channel mismatch — GitHub Issue #5305 pattern: forgetting 1x1 projection

se_block_correct.source_description: Squeeze-and-Excitation block with correct channel dimensions

seq2seq_correct.source_description: Seq2Seq encoder-decoder with correct cross-attention dimensions

seq2seq_decoder_bug.source_description: Seq2Seq decoder output projection dim bug — pattern from fairseq Issues

siamese_correct.source_description: SimCLR-style siamese network with correct projection head

siamese_projection_bug.source_description: SimCLR/BYOL projection head dim mismatch — common in self-supervised learning repos

swin_patch_merge_bug.source_description: Swin Transformer head dimension mismatch — head not updated after adding patch merging stage

unet_correct.source_description: U-Net with correct skip connections and channel handling

unet_encoder_decoder_channel_bug.source_description: U-Net decoder skip connection channel mismatch — common mistake in medical imaging repos

unet_skip_spatial_bug.source_description: U-Net upsampling spatial size mismatch — ConvTranspose2d stride doesn't match MaxPool stride
